Lady Sunderly was a noblewoman of House Sunderly.[2] She was the second rock wife of Lord Quellon Greyjoy.[1] Her given name is unknown.

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Recent Events
    • 2.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 3 Family
  • 4 References

History[ ]

Lady Sunderly was wed by a priest of the Drowned God to Lord Quellon Greyjoy, after the death of his first rock wife.[2]

She was the mother of Balon, Euron, Victarion, Urrigon and Aeron Greyjoy. After her death, Lord Quellon took a new rock wife, a daughter of Lord Piper of Pinkmaiden Castle.[1][2]

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

Aeron recalls his mother after the death of his eldest brother Balon Greyjoy, King of the Isles and the North.[1]
